definition: the color at the long-wavelength end of the visible spectrum (~700 nm)
the color between red and yellow (~620 nm)
the color of ripe lemons and sunflowers (~580 nm)
the color of chlorophyll and grass (~530 nm)
the color of the daytime sky (~470 nm)
the color between blue and violet (~445 nm)
the color at the short-wavelength end of the visible spectrum (~400 nm)
